text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: We have an incredible lineup here! It's something straight out of a dream!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Each carrying the weight of an era on their shoulders, it's a 
showdown between these famous Uma Musume! Now, lined up——

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
An Uma Musume beloved by all, Kitasan Black! After her 
first G1 victory at the 『Kikka Sho』, setting off fireworks 
in other races including the Spring and Autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
The Indomitable Noble Lady, Gentildonna! Obtaining the Triple 
Tiara, and by becoming the first to claim consecutive victories 
at the 『Japan Cup』, forging her own awe-inspiring path!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Pioneering a new era, captivating everyone who saw her 
run, Vodka! Breaking a 64 year drought by winning the 
『Japan Derby』 even as part of the Tiara rotation!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Can you hear the chorus of praise!? TM Opera O! With her undefeated 
record of 8 wins in 8 races, earning her the title Centurial Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Each of them, incredible Uma Musume who have won 7 G1 turf races, 
tied for the most in history! And then……and then! Finally, it's——!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: Symboli Rudolf!!!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
In the Twinkle Series, the first in history to become an 
undefeated Triple Crown Uma Musume! In the Twinkle Series, 
the first Uma Musume in history to become a 7 time turf G1 Winner!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
That 『Strength』 in victory, is already a part of Race History! 
The path she's carved out is truly the Royal Road of the racing world!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
……euphoria. I wonder if that's how to describe this. To be 
given such an opportunity, I can barely contain my excitement.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Together, we stand at the summit. I stand ready——

——I could hear the commotion. Where I was heading……from the 
center of that light, passion, dreams, and aspirations overflowed.

Everyone was waiting. 
For change. For the one to overturn it all.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Then, I'm heading out……Trainer.
choice_data_list: Yeah——Almond Eye. Go out there and win
Yeah——Almond Eye. Go out there and win

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Right. 
I will win. Over everyone.

The times will change. 
——This is not an aspiration. It is undeniable.
And it all began——Several years ago.
————Finally. ……Finally, finally!

I obtained a trainer license for Central. 
I'm going to be a trainer at Tracen Academy!

choice_data_list: (I have to be as prepared as possible)
(I have to be as prepared as possible)

text_block_list.text:
——Sometimes, Uma Musume are called 
『Existences that carry the aspirations of everyone』

Sometimes, a dramatic comeback. Or a graceless, 
unconventional race that throws everything out the window.

That a wish turns in to a run, one that 
may even turn in to salvation. That's why——
choice_data_list: (I want to be the one to support them)
(I want to be the one to support them)

text_block_list.text:
I hope the Uma Musume I'll be responsible for will be able to 
use their full potential to make their dream come true. And to 
shine brightly enough that another will chase after them……!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
[——How to become a "7 G1 winner"……is it? 
That's quite an interesting question]

I looked up……Monthly Twinkle, a recurring talk show 
broadcast, was airing on one of the bookstore monitors.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf-san, with 7 G1 wins——there are plenty who 
have reached this milestone but none have surpassed it.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
For many, a faraway dream. That's why we want 
to know. How can one surpass 7 G1 victories?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
……that is the question, isn't it? Although I have achieved 
7 crowns, I was unable to break past that, so I'm at a loss.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
However——When an Uma Musume that can achieve 
that appears, I'm sure all eyes will be on her.
choice_data_list: (……7 G1 wins. That's quite the topic)
(……7 G1 wins. That's quite the topic)

text_block_list.text:
In the first place, winning just one G1 is an incredible 
achievement on its own. Symboli Rudolf and the others 
with 7 G1 wins is already the longest of the long shots.
choice_data_list: (Will someone really be able to top that?)
(Will someone really be able to top that?)

text_block_list.text: With those lingering thoughts, I headed home……
Near the riverside, a butterfly fluttered weakly along.

I was a little worried so I tried following after it. 
I walked along the bank looking around. Then——
Fuu……!

A strong wind blew. 
A lone Uma Musume ran under the overpass.

Haa, haa, haa, haa! 
……Not yet! Haaaaaaa!!

Her form allowed for a wide range of motion, and she 
kicked at the ground, accelerating in the blink of 
an eye. Her eyes focused ahead, shining brightly.

Haaa, phewー…… ……? Good afternoon! 
That badge. Are you a Tracen Academy trainer?
choice_data_list: Ah……Yeah! I'm a trainer, what about you?
Ah……Yeah! I'm a trainer, what about you?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
I'm Almond Eye! 
A Tracen Academy Uma Musume. Fufuu.

She was a lively Uma Musume with lots of potential. 
That was my first impression of Almond Eye.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three, four. Two, two, three, four. 
……Alright.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Instructor! Almond Eye, departing!

Since then, I'd often see her around the training grounds. 
She was earnest and listened to her instructor.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Haa, haa, haa! Fuu-. 
……it's almost dinnertime, isn't it? ……Alright, just one more!

Occasionally, in the evening, I'd see her 
doing her own self-training on the grounds.

Talented and hard-working, 
an 『Honor Student Uma Musume』
That's……what I thought. At least, at first——
